violations.description: Duties of person in charge. — --Person in charge did not ensure employee compliance with an aspect of the food service operation specified in the food service code. When asked about the proper time and temperature for reheating the Tastee meat, employees did not have an answer. Person in charge should assure employees know the proper temperature and time for reheating potentially hazardous foods. *Potentially hazardous foods should be reheated to 165F with in 1 hour.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee touching his sock with gloved hands and did not change his gloves. Gloves should be changed when touching items not related to food service task.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Ice scoop was found stored in a dirty bucket above the ice machine. Scoops should be stored in a clean location between uses.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
